name: company_db
what: Unified company database: every company the twin has touched, deduped on normalized-name+country, with per-record provenance (company_sources keeps each source layer's record verbatim). SQLite at data/companies.db; company_card view = one row per company.

schema.companies: canonical identity (name, name_norm, country, sector, ticker, is_india_entity)
schema.company_sources: provenance — (layer, role, as_of, payload verbatim JSON)
schema.credit_ratings: layer-24 rating channel (agency, rating, capex disclosure, rationale URL, care_check)
schema.clearance_activity: PARIVESH footprint (filings, states, activity, policy program, visibility verdict)
schema.company_card: VIEW — one row per company joining all of the above

identity_rule: dedup key = lowercased name with legal suffixes stripped (Ltd/Pvt/GmbH/Inc/...) + country; overlaps across layers merge, same-name different-country stay separate
enrichment_next: layer 31 catalogs the external IPA/NDAP sources whose company-level material (Invest India sector pages, IIG project sponsors, state-IPA investor lists) can be joined onto company_id
